heading: Has the defendant already applied for help with their counterclaim fee?
question: Has the defendant already applied for help with their counterclaim fee?
revealedHwfQuestionLabel: Enter the defendant’s Help with Fees reference number
revealedHwfQuestionHint: You (or they) will have received this number when you (or they) applied for Help with Fees. This reference must not have been used for a previous application.For example, HWF-A1B-23C

errors.alreadyAppliedForHelp: Select if the defendant has already applied for help with their counterclaim fee?
errors.hwfReference: Enter the defendant’s Help with Fees reference number
errors.hwfReferenceMaxLength: The defendant’s Help with Fees reference number must be 60 characters or fewer
